chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-7428 of 2022 Kamran Hussain Versus Dilshad & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. 31477/22 2. For orders on Misc. 31478/22 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 21.05.2024 None present. -.-.- Ever since this petition was filed petitioner’s counsel is seeking adjournments on one ground or the other. On first date i.e. 06.12.2022 he requested for time to prepare the brief followed by request of the advocate who held his brief for adjournment on 12.09.2023. He was then remained absent on 15.12.2023 followed by his absence today. There is no intimation either. Petition as such is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
